title: AmetekS711EuresysCoaxlinkQSFPSettings
description: Settings for the Ametek S711 Euresys Coaxlink QSFP camera source.

cfg_path.description: Path to the JSON configuration file for the Phantom S711 camera. The file must contain a top-level 's711' object with camera parameters (Width, Height, PixelFormat, BufferPartCount, ExposureTime, etc.).
